hooks.command: file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.py$'; then python -m pytest collector/ -x -q 2>&1 | tail -5; fi
file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -qE 'schema\.json$'; then echo 'BLOCK: schema.json is the source of truth from Claude Code — do not modify it'; exit 1; fi
